messages.content: I'm opening YouTube for you now.
Hi Prince, how can I help you today?
are you able to open application send
I can trigger actions to open apps, but it seems YouTube didn't open as expected earlier. I'll try again, Opening YouTube for you.
maybe this feature is not added
It's possible that the feature to open external applications is not available in our current setup, Sir.
do you know my nick name ?
how many languages do u know
I can understand and respond in one language, which is English, Prince.
